It has always existed, so you can't stretch two weeks and send somebody a shock and awe package and so forth when they have a dead father on the couch in the living room. So they move the entire process in advance of need. So pre-need planning at the bottom of this burial insurance, at the top of this pre-coffin purchase, Costco's in the coffin business. So people get all that done ahead of time, they lean it up in the garage or make a coffee table out of it. There's a YouTube video which I've not seen. I've only had it described to me of a guy who has had his very elaborate coffin turned into a couch and his answer is, when I drop dead I'll just fall over, close the lid and I'm good to go. So people say you can't do death humor. So they move the whole thing away from need, right? Excuse me. Prepaid legal is a movement of the entire advertising marketing and sales process back in front of need instead of at point of need so that they can do these sorts of things and effectively sell. So hardly any business prohibits it. It's people's own attitudes about it. That's all it is. In some cases it's excuse making, right? That's really what it is. Is I want to disqualify myself from all this so I don't have to deal with it. I'd rather have, as I would say, the world is full of people who would rather have a great excuse than a difficult opportunity. And so some of it is that, right? Some of it is just, you know, being very homage standing in the center of a very small circle looking around and gee nobody else does it that way. Therefore it can't be done that way. But there's no business this can't be done. And the other thing is we didn't promise here a 101 course on selling. We wanted a little bit more sophisticated and different than quite honestly a lot of the books that are still teaching stuff from the 1950s which some of which is fine. Some of which is fine. Some of which is primitive. Exactly. Very primitive. So let's go. We've got a bunch of questions here. Okay. Well, here we go. Boom. Let's answer it as an example here. Alright. So we don't have the person's name because no? No. Okay. So how do I apply risk reversal to a consultant business or any other kind of business where you can really, you really can't guarantee the results? Well, in many cases you can guarantee results if you choose to. Of course you can. Unless of course you can't produce results. Right. But so Jerry Jones for years. One of our members. In selling direct mail programs to dentists has paid for the printing and the postage of the first campaign triggering a 12 month contract providing certain results are achieved with that campaign because he is so sure of what he can actually produce. Okay. You can often guarantee some front portion of what it is. So for many years I don't do it anymore. I don't have to. And it was all creative math anyway. But for many years I sold consulting the initial day. Three things are going to happen at the end of the day. One of three things. One is you will have had a great day. You're going to leave with all sorts of value. You'll be happy. And that's as far as it's going to go, which is fine. Two, there's going to be other stuff you're going to want me to do for you that will become evident during the course of the day and we will agree on that project work and you'll be happy and I'll be very happy. The third thing that could happen is you have a horrible day. You think you've got no value. You definitely don't want to do anything else, which is fine. Anytime during the day or at the end of the day, I'll hand you check back to you and we'll hug and you can go home. Okay. Now I no longer do the third part of that. Right. And no guarantees were attached to the project. Right. Agreed to other than the meeting of deadlines and the delivery of the word. But in all sorts of industries, guaranteed barriers have been broken and get broken. So enterprise right now is aggressively advertised selling cars, not renting cars. And you have a 30 day, bring it back, get all your money back guarantee on the car. So buy it, take it home, drive it for 30 days to pre-owned car.
